title: Casa & Casa Classico Stainless Steel Kitchen Sink Organiser with Tray, Caddy Sponge Holder, Tidy Utensil Holder, Drains Water for Kitchen & Bathroom, Fingerprint-Proof Coating, Sink Area Organiser
features: 【 PERFECT STORAGE SOLUTION 】: Say Good-Bye to Mess and Keep Your Kitchen Sink Tidy! With Casa & Casa Stainless Steel Sink Caddy, store your dish brushes, cloths, scouring pad, sponge, and other cleaning accessories in an organised way and within your reach without taking up too much space.

【 STURDY CONSTRUCTION 】: Made of premium quality, rust-proof stainless steel material with a fingerprint-proof coating provides more durability to last longer. Its curved surface design is more stylish, and the bottom non-slip strip and rail grips feature stability to keep your items in place.

【 FITS ANY KITCHEN DECOR 】: The simple, Slim and modern design of these Kitchen Sink Organisers fits right in with the decor of any kitchen space. It can be used in the kitchen or bathroom, keeping your sink area neat and everything you need within easy reach.

【 EASY TO CLEAN 】: With a smooth stainless-steel body surface, Our Sink Organiser can be easily wiped with a damp cloth, leaving no traces of food residues and water stains, leaving no fingerprints, and easier to keep clean and maintain.

【 MULTI-USE STEEL RAILING 】: Casa & Casa offers a drip tray at the front of this caddy and the steel rail leaves enough room to keep your sponges, scouring pads and sink strainer in place. You can also use it to dry the dish towels after use.
description: Product Description Casa and Casa offer a stylish range of sink-side accessories that help organize your space beautifully and keep your sink area neat and everything you need within easy reach. Fingerprint-Proof Coating Sturdy Stainless-Steel Body Non-Slip Feet Rustproof Dismantles For Easy Cleaning Specifications: Product Size: 18 x 12.3 x 13cm Material: Stainless Steel Drip Tray: Yes Non-Slip Feet: Yes Made of premium quality, rust-proof stainless steel material with a fingerprint-proof coating provides more durability to last longer. Its curved surface design is more stylish, and the bottom non-slip strip and rail grips feature stability to keep your items in place. Say Good-Bye To Mess and Keep Your Kitchen Sink Tidy! With this Sink Organisers, our goal is to take all the stress out of storing your dish brushes and sponges organised and within your reach without too much space. With a smooth stainless-steel body surface, Our Sink Organiser can be easily wiped with a damp cloth, leaving no traces of food residues and water stains, leaving no fingerprints, and easier to keep clean and maintain.
